title: Indulgent Norwegian Aubergine Flatbread
description: A yeasty, light flatbread with roasted aubergine, dill, and pine nuts, perfect for a macrobiotic-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine rye flour, kveik yeast, and sea salt, then stir to mix evenly.
Add warm water and olive oil to the dry mixture, then stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Transfer the dough onto a floured surface and knead for 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise for 60 minutes until doubled in size.
While the dough rises, heat a grill pan over medium-high heat and grill the aubergine and red onion slices for 3 minutes on each side until charred and soft.
In a small bowl, mix the grilled aubergine, onion, fresh dill, toasted pine nuts, oat milk, apple cider vinegar, and black pepper until well combined.
Punch down the risen dough and roll it out into a 12x20 inch rectangle, then spread the aubergine mixture evenly over the dough.
Bake the flatbread in a preheated 230°C oven for 15 minutes until the edges are crispy and the surface is lightly browned.
